description_long: This is a rectangular, dark-colored bottle with a prominent black label on the front, featuring white text and ornate borders. The bottle has a broad, flat body with slightly rounded shoulders and a short neck topped by a black screw cap. The front label displays the Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey branding in bold, stylized fonts, while the back and side labels provide additional product information and legal details. The bottle appears to be made of glass, with a glossy finish that reflects light, and the cap is likely made of plastic or metal. The overall design is classic and instantly recognizable, with a monochrome color scheme dominated by black, white, and hints of metallic elements. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation, and the bottle appears to be sealed and full.
description: A rectangular, dark glass bottle with a black screw cap and prominent Jack Daniel's branding in white on the front label. The bottle has a glossy finish and classic whiskey bottle design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey label in white on a black background.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a block of white text with product and legal information on a black label.
description_view_2: Side view with additional branding and text, including a signature and smaller print details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more product information and design elements in white on black.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey' in ornate white text on black; side and back labels have additional white text and branding details.
